channel.title: Tools on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: .htaccess generator
item.description: Even if your back office is already secured by PrestaShop’s login, you might want to add another layer of security from your webserver itself. This is done using the htaccess.txt and htpasswd.txt files. After you’ve uploaded them at the root of the folder to secure (in our case, your back office folder), the server will ask you for a username and a password before you can even access your PrestaShop back office login page.
